case_title: JIRAITTEWANNA, RATANA et al VS TOKYO INTERNATIONAL INVESTMENT LTD. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TOKYO INTERNATIONAL INVESTMENT LTD.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-11-1993, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIRAITTEWANNA, RATANA TUNGKITKANCHAROEN, SONGSUK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOKYO INTERNATIONAL INVESTMENT LTD. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,036.00, THE CONTRACT SIGNED BY PLTFS WITH DEFT WAS ONE OF COHESION. THE TERMS WERE INCOMPREHENSIBLE TO PLTFS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT TOKYO INTERNATIONAL INVESTMENT LTD.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22799, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIRAITTEWANNA, RATANA TUNGKITKANCHAROEN, SONGSUK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TOKYO INTERNATIONAL INVESTMENT LTD. ENDAYA, MENCHU KHONG, SIEW PAUL ORDER OF THE SUP COURT DATED 12/13/94 SCA 22799 TO VACATE JUDGMENT & ENTER JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOKYO INTERNATIONAL INVESTMENT LTD. ENDAYA, MENCHU KHONG, SIEW PAUL SEE ORDER OF 12-13-93 BY JUDGE IN SUP. COURT SCA #22799 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JIRAITTEWANNA, RATANA TUNGKITKANCHAROEN, SONGSUK AS TO DEFENDANT TOKYO INTERNATIONAL INVESTMENT LTD. ENDAYA, MENCHU KHONG, SIEW PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
